metadata.title: Purchase Order Number Generator for Excel - PO-10001 Series
metadata.description: Generate purchase order number sequences for Excel, procurement sheets, CSV imports, and padded PO lists.

hero.title: Purchase order number generator for Excel
hero.description: Create PO-10001, PO-2026-0001, vendor order lists, and procurement sheet numbers in bulk.

announcement.title: For purchase order trackers, vendor sheets, and CSV imports

intent.title: Generate purchase order numbers without spreadsheet cleanup
intent.description: PO lists need consistent prefixes and sortable numbers. Set the pattern once, then paste formulas or export fixed values for procurement workflows.

image.alt: Purchase order numbers generated for Excel

items.title: PO prefixes
items.description: Use PO, PO-2026, BUY, ORDER, or a team-specific procurement prefix.

items.title: Next-number control
items.description: Start from the next order number in your tracker and generate only the rows you need.

items.title: Import-friendly values
items.description: Copy formulas for Excel or export fixed CSV/TXT values for another system.

workflow.title: How to create PO numbers in Excel
workflow.description: Use the generator before creating a purchase order tracker or vendor import sheet.

items.title: Choose a purchase order prefix
items.description: For example, use PO as the prefix and a hyphen separator.

items.title: Enter the next order number
items.description: Start from 10001, 20260001, or the next number in your existing tracker.

items.title: Export the sequence
items.description: Use formulas when staying in Excel and CSV/TXT when importing fixed order IDs.

related.title: Related business numbering pages
related.description: Choose the page that matches your spreadsheet workflow.

items.title: Invoice numbers
items.description: For INV-2026-0001 document sequences and bookkeeping prep.

items.title: SKU sequences
items.description: For product and catalog labels that need CSV output.

items.title: Serial numbers
items.description: For asset, equipment, and warranty tracking lists.

items.question: Can I generate PO-10001 style numbers?
items.answer: Yes. Use PO as the prefix, a hyphen separator, start at 10001, and keep padding off or set it to your preferred width.

items.question: Can I start from my next purchase order number?
items.answer: Yes. Set the start number to the next available PO number in your tracker.

items.question: Is this procurement software?
items.answer: No. It is a spreadsheet sequence helper. Use it to prepare IDs, then keep approvals and records in your procurement system.

cta.title: Generate purchase order numbers now
cta.description: Open the generator, enter your PO pattern, and copy the output into Excel or your import file.
